parameters.jsCode: const input = $input.first().json; const order = input.order || input; const phone = order.phone || ''; const amount = parseFloat(order.amount) || 0; const city = order.city || ''; const product = order.product || ''; const customerName = order.customerName || order.customer_name || ''; const checks = {hasPhone: phone.length >= 10, reasonableAmount: amount > 0 && amount < 50000, knownCity: ['cairo','alexandria','giza','mansoura','tanta'].includes(city.toLowerCase()), hasProduct: product.length > 0}; let score = 0; if (!checks.hasPhone) score += 0.3; if (!checks.reasonableAmount) score += 0.25; if (!checks.knownCity) score += 0.15; if (product.toLowerCase().includes('free')) score += 0.5; const status = score > 0.5 ? 'suspicious' : score > 0.2 ? 'review' : 'valid'; return [{json: {orderId: order.orderId || ('ORD-' + Date.now()), phone, amount, city, product, customerName, checks, suspiciousScore: score, status, confidence: Math.max(0, 1 - score)}}];

parts.text: Create short Egyptian Arabic WhatsApp confirmation. Customer {{ $json.customerName }}, Product {{ $json.product }}, Amount EGP {{ $json.amount }}, Status {{ $json.status }}. 2 sentences max.

messages.content: You are an AI assistant for Egyptian e-commerce.
Create Egyptian Arabic order confirmation for {{ $json.customerName }}, product {{ $json.product }}, EGP {{ $json.amount }}, status {{ $json.status }}

parameters.jsCode: const gemini = $input.all().find(n => n.json?.candidates)?.json; const groq = $input.all().find(n => n.json?.choices)?.json; const ctx = $('Process').first().json; let message = ''; let provider = 'mock'; if (gemini?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text) { message = gemini.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text; provider = 'gemini'; } else if (groq?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content) { message = groq.choices[0].message.content; provider = 'groq'; } else { const m = {valid: 'Hello ' + ctx.customerName + '! Your order ' + ctx.product + ' (EGP ' + ctx.amount + ') is ready. Reply CONFIRM.', review: 'Hi ' + ctx.customerName + ', we have your order for ' + ctx.product + '. Can we confirm details?', suspicious: 'Thank you for your interest. We will contact you for verification.'}; message = m[ctx.status] || m.review; } return [{json: {success: true, orderId: ctx.orderId, status: ctx.confidence > 0.7 ? 'confirmed' : ctx.confidence > 0.4 ? 'pending_review' : 'suspicious', confidence: ctx.confidence, message, provider, checks: ctx.checks}}];
